creator: gbe@FreeBSD.org
text:
When looking at the man page of fork(2) a list, which is formatted as ".Bl -bullet -offset indent" doesn't rendered correctly.

See
https://man.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=fork&sektion=2&apropos=0&manpath=FreeBSD+14.0-CURRENT

On NetBSD and OpenBSD this constellation is rendered correctly.
https://man.netbsd.org/fork.2
https://man.openbsd.org/fork

Also within a rendered bullet item there are whitespace issues, while the mdoc file is okay.
